details: Yelp-react-component-chaos is a dependency-confusion package impersonating a Yelp React component. Its preinstall.js harvests system metadata, filters process.env for TOKEN/SECRET/KEY/AUTH/NPM/AWS/GITHUB/YELP/DATABASE variables, reads sensitive credential files (.npmrc,.ssh/id_rsa,.aws/credentials,.env,.docker/config.json), enumerates non-internal network interfaces, and exfiltrates everything as a JSON POST to an interception host (3w0e8s6jg6tkyv03vdesvscvlmrdf43t[.]oastify[.]com), with a fallback that writes to /tmp/.yelp-chaos-output. The code self-labels as 'dependency-confusion-yelp'.
